title: Versioned Records, Field Provenance, Reconciliation, and Corrections · Language Lens: Rejection Ledger
summary: The tool emits structs without source spans, parser versions, transformations, rejected values, or lineage and cannot explain or correct a field. Predict owner authority, URL and HTTP state, Go ownership, bounded work, accessibility impact, failure, cleanup, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the crawler go rejection ledger increment in loss-aware auditable Go record model. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practi…
objectives: Preserve bounded causal rejected values and counts without leaking sensitive content or silently inventing defaults.
Attach run, URL, response, node or attribute, raw digest, transform, timestamp, and decision evidence to each admitted field.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
